fields.helpText: YOU MUST NOT EDIT THIS FIELD IF IT IS PART OF A NATIONAL REGISTRY  DEFINITION.   The ICD codes defined for this registry will be used to select qualified  patients.
This multiple contains a list of ICD codes in the ICD DIAGNOSIS file (#80).  Selection rules for a registry use these codes to find new registry patients during the registry update process.

This multiple contains a list of ICD codes in the ICD OPERATION/PROCEDURE file (#80.1).  Selection rules for a registry use these codes to find new registry patients during the registry update process.
This multiple contains a list of CPT codes in the CPT file (#81).  Selection rules for a registry use these codes to find new registry patients during the registry update process.
